concerns.text: Task list lacks any task to implement 'block bootstrap' or calculate 'empirical coverage of 95% confidence intervals' required by SC-003. The plan mentions 'Coverage calculation' in Phase 3, but no specific task (e.g., 'Implement block bootstrap sampling in src/evaluation/metrics.py') exists to produce this artifact.

The spec's 'Assumptions' section mandates a 'sensitivity analysis' sweeping thresholds over {90th, 95th, 99th} percentiles. No task in the list implements this sweep or generates the corresponding robustness report, leaving the assumption unverified.

Task T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse. It does not name the specific directories/files to create (e.g., 'mkdir -p src/data src/models...'). The atomizer will need to split this into individual file-creation tasks.

Task T037 'Documentation updates in docs/ and README.md' is too coarse. It does not specify which sections to update or what content to include (e.g., 'Update README.md with CLI usage examples and data hygiene instructions').

Task T038 'Code cleanup and refactoring of src/pipeline' is too coarse. It lacks specific criteria for what constitutes 'cleanup' (e.g., 'Refactor src/pipeline/run_analysis.py to reduce cyclomatic complexity below 10').

Task T039 'Performance optimization for spatial model fitting (vectorization)' is too coarse. It does not define the target metric (e.g., 'Reduce spatial model fit time by 50% via vectorized operations in src/models/spatial_model.py').
Task T040 'Additional unit tests for edge cases' is too coarse. It does not list the specific edge cases or test names (e.g., 'Add tests/unit/test_edge_cases.py::test_empty_dataset_handling').
